title: 业务英语闯关
summary: 围绕支付与策略运营的真实工作场景，通过单选和排序学习表达结构。可以直接查看中英文参考答案或自由切换题目，目标不是背模板，而是形成能在邮件、会议、汇报和面试中调用的表达方式。
story: 你刚加入一个跨境支付增长项目。六个章节会带你从理解支付链路，一路走到跨区域上线和最终英文面试。

translations.authorization-capture-settlement: 授权用于检查客户是否有足够的资金或信用额度，并临时预留相应金额。请款确认商户希望完成这笔扣款。结算发生在之后，资金通过支付链路划转至商户账户。因此，授权获批并不代表商户已经收到款项。
translations.refund-chargeback: 退款由商户发起，资金通过原支付方式退还。拒付由持卡人通过发卡行发起，用于对交易提出争议。商户可以提交证据，但也可能承担争议处理费并面临更高的拒付率。因此，拒付需要单独的调查处理流程。
translations.payment-participants: 发卡行为客户发卡，并决定是否批准交易。卡组织在发卡侧和收单侧之间路由交易信息。收单行为商户提供银行卡受理服务。支付服务商通过统一服务，将商户连接到一个或多个收单机构及支付方式。
translations.kyc-kyb-aml: KYC 用于验证个人客户的身份，KYB 则验证企业，包括注册信息和所有权结构。AML 是防止洗钱的整体框架。在商户入驻过程中，我们会对企业执行 KYB，对相关受益所有人执行 KYC，并根据风险进行 AML 筛查和持续监控。
translations.take-rate-net-revenue: 费率等于支付总收入除以支付交易规模。净收入还取决于处理成本、网络费用、激励支出和损失。费率提高并不必然带来同等幅度的净收入增长，因此应同时评估定价和单位经济。
translations.bluf-rewrite:
主题：建议将巴西试点推迟一周

我建议把巴西试点从 8 月 12 日推迟到 8 月 19 日。退款 API 有两个回归测试用例失败，现在上线可能造成大量人工退款并损害商户体验。工程团队将在周五前完成修复，运营团队将在周一重新执行检查清单。如在周四下午 3 点前没有异议，我会更新上线计划。
translations.polite-data-request: Elena，你好。可以请你在周三中午前提供过去八周按国家和支付方式拆分的支付成功率吗？我们需要这些数据制定第三季度恢复计划。CSV 包含周、国家、支付方式、尝试次数和成功支付次数即可，不需要制作幻灯片。如果无法提供完整数据，先提供前五大市场也足以让我们开始分析。
translations.delay-notice: 商户试点将从周一推迟到周三开始，因为最终风险规则还需要两天验证。目前没有商户数据受到影响，但销售团队应暂停确认上线。风险团队正在加急审查，我会在周二下午 4 点前发送是否上线的更新。
translations.action-minutes:
决定：在根因和修复方案完成评审前，我们将维持当前路由规则。

行动项：
1. 数据团队——周五前完成根因分析。
2. 产品团队——下周二前确认首选解决方案。
3. 运营团队——审批通过后，于下周三发送商户通知。

如果负责人或截止时间有误，请在明天中午前回复。
translations.executive-escalation: 我需要升级反馈付款对账工作流中尚未解决的责任人缺口。我们在前两次评审中都提出需要明确负责人，但验证任务至今无人负责。如果周五前仍未确定负责人，第三季度迁移很可能至少推迟一周。工作范围和投入已经记录，能否请你在周四前协调财务数据团队或支付数据团队承接？
translations.success-rate-drop: 整体支付成功率环比下降 1.6 个百分点，从 92.4% 降至 90.8%。德国银行卡支付贡献了约 70% 的降幅，问题从周二路由变更后开始出现。这一模式表明问题可能与特定路由有关。我们已回滚变更，并将在明天评审前比较发卡行响应码。
translations.gmv-up-revenue-down: GMV 环比增长 12%，但支付净收入下降 3%。更多交易量来自定价较低的大型商户，同时单笔交易处理成本上升。我们应分别评估商户结构变化和成本上涨的影响，并按商户同期群检查净收入，以找出单位经济恶化的位置。
translations.incident-update: 10:20 至 11:05 期间，钱包支付超时影响了东南亚约 8% 的请求。我们在 11:05 将流量切换至备用渠道，成功率现已恢复正常。目前支付处理正常，同时我们正在调查根因。下一次更新将在下午 1 点前发布。
translations.experiment-result: 新版结账流程使转化率提高了 0.7 个百分点，95% 置信区间为 0.2 至 1.2 个百分点。我们没有发现退款率出现显著变化，但该实验并非为排除小幅影响而设计。我建议分阶段上线，并持续监控转化率、退款率和客服联系量。
translations.executive-summary: 第二季度实现强劲增长：活跃商户环比增长 18%，支付交易规模增长 24%。但投诉率从 0.6% 上升至 0.9%，主要原因是结算延迟。增长总体健康，但结算体验可能限制留存。第三季度我们将优先提高可靠性，把延迟付款减少 50%，并增加主动商户通知。
translations.clarify-vague-request: 为了确保我们解决的是正确问题，可以先澄清三点吗？最重要的结果是授权率、转化率还是速度？我们是否聚焦特定市场或支付方式？需要在什么时间前做出什么决定？我目前的理解是，我们要为第三季度路线图找出最大且可恢复的转化缺口。
translations.respectful-disagreement: 我同意应该尽快获得转化收益。我的顾虑是运营风险，因为试点只覆盖了两个市场。我建议先向 10% 的合格流量开放，观察 48 小时的成功率和错误码；如果护栏指标正常，再继续扩大。这样的分阶段方案能否满足商业时间要求？
translations.no-bandwidth: 我理解团队资源已经排满。不过，当前缺口每周需要约 40 小时人工处理。我们能否评估一个更小的第一步，例如先自动化处理最主要的两类不匹配？如果仍不可行，我希望把此事项与当前优先级最低的已承诺项目进行比较，由管理层明确做出取舍。
translations.confirm-owner-deadline: 在会议结束前，我确认一下下一步。我们同意比较当前定价模式与按交易量定价的方案。Maya，我的理解是由你负责分析，并在下周四前提交一页建议。这个范围和时间对你是否可行？我今天会记录相关依赖。
translations.regional-objection: 如果商户的现金周转周期较长，这个顾虑是合理的。你能否提供数据显示标准政策在哪些地方造成了最大缺口？我们可以保留全球统一的准入规则，同时针对明确人群测试不同的付款周期。如果参与度提高且损失没有增加，就能形成支持区域调整的证据。
translations.localization-translation: 翻译只是改变语言，本地化则是根据当地行为和要求调整完整体验。针对墨西哥，我们应验证当地偏好的支付方式、分期习惯、地址格式、信任信息、监管披露和客服流程。还需要与本地用户测试，而不能假设翻译后的全球设计会有同样的转化表现。
translations.market-entry-memo: 我建议首次上线优先选择市场 B，同时完成市场 A 的监管可行性评估。市场 A 的长期潜力更大，但牌照不确定性可能同时改变成本和时间。市场 B 可以借助现有合作伙伴，更快验证真实需求。当合规成本估算达到决策所需质量后，我们可以重新评估市场 A。
translations.timezone-agreement: 我建议采用轮换会议时间，避免总是由同一区域承担深夜会议。决策议题应至少提前 24 小时发布，每个区域应在一个工作日内回复。会后记录决定和负责人。影响上线的紧急事件则使用值班渠道和明确的区域联系人。
translations.compliance-uncertainty: 我们尚未确认返现流程是否属于当地受监管资金的范围。法务预计在 9 月 15 日前取得外部法律意见，该结论是上线的前置条件。在此之前，我们不应承诺公开上线日期，但仍可完成产品设计、供应商尽职调查和备选资金流方案。
translations.global-local-conflict: 双方团队都希望提高可持续净收入，但全球团队更重视利润率，本地团队更重视留存。我建议按盈利能力、价格敏感度和战略价值对商户分层，再估算不同情景下的净收入。对于预期收益高于流失风险的人群可以提价；对于价格敏感的高价值商户，则使用经过审批且有期限的例外方案。
translations.self-introduction: 我是一名战略与运营专业人士，擅长把客户和交易数据转化为可规模化的改进。在最近的工作中，我使用漏斗分析识别高影响的体验缺口，并通过明确负责人和量化结果，推动产品、数据及一线团队共同交付项目。我希望将数据分析与执行落地的组合能力用于支付增长和商户运营，在可靠性、单位经济和客户体验之间取得平衡。
translations.star-payment-project: 情境：从结账到支付成功的转化下降了 [X%]。任务：我负责在六周内找出最主要且可恢复的缺口。行动：我按市场、支付方式和响应码重建漏斗，发现一条效果较差的路由规则，并协调产品、风险和工程团队开展带护栏的试点。结果：成功率提高了 [X] 个百分点，每月恢复了 [金额] 的交易规模。复盘：现在我会在上线前明确决策和回滚阈值。
translations.failure-story: 我曾在只验证平均影响、没有检查较小区域分群的情况下上线一项政策。整体指标有所改善，但某个分群的投诉大幅增加，我们因此暂停上线。我承担了这一疏漏，联系受影响客户并重新分析数据。随后，我增加了分群护栏和上线前检查清单。在接下来的两次上线中，所有分群指标都保持在约定阈值内。
translations.why-role: 这个岗位结合了三类我擅长的工作：用数据诊断表现、设计运营策略，以及协调产品和商业团队完成交付。我曾使用漏斗和同期群分析确定客户问题的优先级，并将发现转化为有明确负责人的行动计划。这个岗位能让我把这些优势应用于支付可靠性和商户增长，同时深入学习支付单位经济和国际化运营。
translations.project-recap-questions:
开场：我会介绍一个通过数据诊断和跨职能交付改善 [用户旅程] 的项目。
1. 业务问题和客户影响。
2. 改变我们认知的关键洞察。
3. 备选方案以及我建议的取舍。
4. 试点、负责人、风险与分歧。
5. 量化影响和局限。
6. 我会保留或改变的做法。

提问：
- 当前团队最难改善的支付或商户指标是什么？
- 全球产品团队与本地运营团队如何划分决策权？

levels.title: 支付术语基础
levels.subtitle: 把支付链路和核心指标讲准确
levels.objective: 能够用简洁英语解释支付参与方、资金流程、合规概念和商业指标。
levels.chapter: 第一章 · 加入支付团队
levels.story: 入职第一周，你需要向海外同事讲清支付链路，避免团队因术语误解做出错误判断。

reward.title: 支付术语速查卡
reward.description: 完成本章后，下面这些表达可以直接用于支付业务沟通。
items: Authorization reserves funds; settlement moves funds.
A chargeback is initiated through the issuing bank.
Review pricing together with unit economics.

questions.title: 授权、请款与结算

activity.prompt: 哪一句最准确地解释 authorization？
choices: Authorization means the merchant has received settled funds.
Authorization checks and temporarily reserves available funds.
Authorization is a dispute initiated by the cardholder.
activity.feedback: 授权阶段检查并预留额度，资金尚未结算给商户。

questions.prompt: 一位海外同事把 authorization、capture 和 settlement 当成同一个动作。你需要在会议中澄清三者的先后关系。
questions.task: 用 3 至 5 句英文解释三个阶段，并说明授权成功不代表商户已经收到钱。
questions.hint: 按“检查并预留额度 → 确认扣款 → 资金划转”的顺序组织。

answer.sample: Authorization checks whether the customer has sufficient funds or credit and temporarily reserves the amount. Capture confirms that the merchant wants to complete the charge. Settlement happens later, when funds are transferred through the payment chain to the merchant's account. Therefore, an approved authorization does not mean that the merchant has already received the money.
notes: 先用动词说明每一步做什么，再交代资金是否真正移动。
最后一句明确纠正常见误解。

questions.title: 退款与拒付
questions.prompt: 客服团队询问 refund 和 chargeback 为什么不能使用同一套处理流程。
questions.task: 用英文说明两者由谁发起、资金如何退回，以及商户面临的额外影响。
questions.hint: 从 initiator、process 和 merchant impact 三个维度对比。

answer.sample: A refund is initiated by the merchant and sends money back through the original payment method. A chargeback is initiated by the cardholder through the issuing bank to dispute a transaction. The merchant may submit evidence, but can also face dispute fees and a higher chargeback ratio. That is why chargebacks require a separate investigation workflow.
notes: 使用 is initiated by 清楚交代发起方。
chargeback 还包括举证、费用和比率风险。

questions.title: 支付链路参与方
questions.prompt: 新同事不清楚 issuer、acquirer、card network 和 PSP 分别服务谁。
questions.task: 以一笔银行卡支付为例，用英文介绍四类参与方的职责。
questions.hint: 从持卡人一侧讲到商户一侧，再补充 PSP 的连接作用。

answer.sample: The issuer provides the card to the customer and decides whether to approve the transaction. The card network routes messages between the issuing and acquiring sides. The acquirer provides card acceptance services to the merchant. A PSP connects the merchant to one or more acquirers and payment methods through a unified service.
notes: issuer 对应 customer，acquirer 对应 merchant。
PSP 的价值用 unified service 概括，避免把它误说成银行。

questions.title: KYC、KYB 与 AML
questions.prompt: 产品团队想把商户入驻审核统称为 KYC，合规同事要求你说明术语边界。
questions.task: 用英文区分 KYC、KYB 和 AML，并说明三者如何共同出现在商户入驻流程中。
questions.hint: 先区分 customer 与 business，再说明 AML 是持续性的风险框架。

answer.sample: KYC verifies an individual customer's identity, while KYB verifies a business, including its registration and ownership. AML is the broader framework for preventing money laundering. During merchant onboarding, we perform KYB on the company, KYC on relevant beneficial owners, and AML screening and monitoring based on risk.
notes: beneficial owners 是商户审核中的高频表达。
AML 不只是一次 screening，还可能包含持续 monitoring。

questions.title: 费率与净收入
questions.prompt: 管理层看到 take rate 上升，认为净收入一定同比例增长，但支付通道成本也发生了变化。
questions.task: 用英文解释 take rate、gross revenue 和 net revenue 的关系，并指出需要同时查看成本。
questions.hint: 给出简短公式，再说明为什么单看费率不够。

answer.sample: Take rate is gross payment revenue divided by payment volume. Net revenue also depends on processing costs, network fees, incentives and losses. A higher take rate does not automatically produce the same increase in net revenue, so we should review both pricing and unit economics.
notes: 用 divided by 直接给出指标定义。
列出主要成本项，证明净收入不是只由费率决定。

levels.title: 清晰商务写作
levels.subtitle: 写出结论先行、动作明确的邮件
levels.objective: 能够快速写出结构清楚、语气得体并带有负责人和截止时间的商务邮件。
levels.chapter: 第二章 · 推动海外试点
levels.story: 巴西试点出现延期风险。你需要通过邮件把结论、证据、负责人和截止时间讲清楚。

reward.title: 结论先行邮件卡
reward.description: 三句话快速搭出一封行动明确的商务邮件。
items: Unless there are objections by ..., I will ...

questions.title: 结论先行改写

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合作为延期建议邮件的第一句？
choices: As you may already know, we have recently reviewed several issues.
I am writing this email to discuss the Brazil pilot.
I recommend moving the Brazil pilot from 12 August to 19 August.
activity.feedback: 首句直接写建议和日期，收件人不必从背景中寻找结论。

questions.prompt: 你建议将巴西试点推迟一周，因为退款接口尚未通过回归测试。
questions.task: 写一封不超过 90 词的英文邮件，第一句直接给出建议，再补充原因和下一步。
questions.hint: 使用 recommendation → evidence → next step 的结构。

answer.sample:
Subject: Recommendation to delay the Brazil pilot by one week

I recommend moving the Brazil pilot from 12 August to 19 August. The refund API has failed two regression cases, so launching now could create manual refunds and a poor merchant experience. Engineering will complete the fixes by Friday, and Operations will rerun the checklist on Monday. Unless there are objections by Thursday 3 p.m., I will update the launch plan.
notes: 标题和首句都直接写决策。
最后给出负责人、动作和异议截止时间。

questions.title: 礼貌请求数据
questions.prompt: 你需要欧洲团队在周三前提供过去八周各支付方式的成功率数据，他们本周任务很多。
questions.task: 用英文提出请求，说明用途、字段、截止时间，并给对方降低工作量的选项。
questions.hint: 礼貌不等于模糊，deadline 和 minimum scope 都要清楚。

answer.sample: Hi Elena, could you please share the last eight weeks of payment success rates by country and payment method by Wednesday noon? We need the data for the Q3 recovery plan. A CSV with week, country, method, attempts and successful payments is sufficient; no slides are needed. If the full extract is not available, the top five markets would still let us begin.
notes: 请求内容和用途都具体。
给出 minimum viable scope，降低整体延误概率。

questions.title: 项目延期通知
questions.prompt: 风控规则配置比计划晚两天，商户试点将从周一推迟到周三。
questions.task: 写一段英文延期通知，说明影响、原因、缓解措施和下次更新时间。
questions.hint: 不要只说 sorry for the delay，要让对方知道如何安排客户预期。

answer.sample: The merchant pilot will start on Wednesday instead of Monday because the final risk rules need two additional days of validation. No merchant data has been affected, but Sales should pause launch confirmations. The risk team is running an expedited review, and I will send a go/no-go update by Tuesday at 4 p.m.
notes: 第一句同时写清新旧时间和原因。
明确影响边界、缓解动作和下一更新时间。

questions.title: 行动型会议纪要
questions.prompt: 会议决定：数据团队周五给根因分析，产品团队下周二确认方案，运营团队下周三通知商户。
questions.task: 写一封简短英文纪要，包含决定、行动项、负责人和日期。
questions.hint: 重点不是复述讨论，而是固定 decision 和 action items。

answer.sample:
Decision: We will keep the current routing rule until the root cause and fix are reviewed.

Actions:
1. Data team — complete the root-cause analysis by Friday.
2. Product team — confirm the preferred solution by next Tuesday.
3. Operations — send the merchant notice by next Wednesday after approval.

Please reply by tomorrow noon if any owner or deadline is incorrect.
notes: 把 decision 与 actions 分开，便于扫读。
每个行动项使用 owner + verb + deadline。

questions.title: 向上升级问题
questions.prompt: 一个关键依赖连续两周没有负责人，已经威胁季度目标。你需要向总监升级，但不能显得在指责其他团队。
questions.task: 写一段英文升级说明：事实、业务影响、已尝试动作，以及需要总监做的决定。
questions.hint: 聚焦 unresolved dependency，不评价个人态度。

answer.sample: I am escalating an unresolved ownership gap in the payout reconciliation workstream. We requested an owner in the last two reviews, but the validation task remains unassigned. Without an owner by Friday, the Q3 migration is likely to slip by at least one week. The scope and effort are documented; could you help assign either the Finance Data or Payments Data team by Thursday?
notes: 使用可核验事实，不描述某团队不配合。
结尾提出二选一的明确决策请求。

levels.title: 数据汇报
levels.subtitle: 从数字走向判断和行动
levels.objective: 能够用英文讲清指标变化、诊断证据、业务影响与后续动作。
levels.chapter: 第三章 · 诊断成功率事故
levels.story: 支付成功率突然下降。你要在有限时间内向管理层讲清变化、定位、判断和下一步。

reward.title: 四句数据汇报卡
reward.description: 用固定顺序把数字变成可行动的业务判断。
items: Metric change: what changed and by how much.
Diagnosis: where and when the change happened.
Action: what we did and when we will update.

questions.title: 支付成功率下降

activity.prompt: 成功率从 92.4% 降至 90.8%，哪一种说法准确？
activity.feedback: 两个百分比相减得到百分点变化，因此应使用 percentage points。

questions.prompt: 本周整体支付成功率从 92.4% 降至 90.8%，主要来自德国银行卡支付，下降发生在周二路由调整后。
questions.task: 用 4 句英文汇报变化、定位、初步判断和行动。
questions.hint: 回答 where、when 和 what next。

answer.sample: Overall payment success rate fell 1.6 percentage points week over week, from 92.4% to 90.8%. Germany card payments accounted for about 70% of the decline, which began after Tuesday's routing change. The pattern suggests a route-specific issue. We have rolled back the change and will compare issuer response codes before tomorrow's review.
notes: 百分点使用 percentage points。
用 suggests 表达初步判断，避免把猜测说成事实。

questions.title: 交易额涨、收入降
questions.prompt: GMV 环比增长 12%，但支付净收入下降 3%。低费率大商户占比提高，通道成本也增加。
questions.task: 用英文解释表面矛盾，并提出两个需要进一步验证的分析。
questions.hint: 从 mix shift 和 unit economics 两条线展开。

answer.sample: GMV increased by 12% month over month, while net payment revenue declined by 3%. More volume came from large merchants on lower pricing tiers, and processing cost per transaction increased. We should separate the impact of merchant mix from cost inflation and review net revenue by merchant cohort to find deteriorating unit economics.
notes: while 适合对照两个方向相反的指标。
提出可执行的分解方法，而不是停留在猜测。

questions.title: 事故状态更新
questions.prompt: 东南亚电子钱包从 10:20 起出现超时，影响约 8% 的请求；11:05 已切换备用通道，成功率恢复。根因还在调查。
questions.task: 写一段英文事故更新，区分已知事实、恢复状态和待确认事项。
questions.hint: 根因未确定时不要使用 was caused by。

answer.sample: From 10:20 to 11:05, wallet payment timeouts affected approximately 8% of requests in Southeast Asia. We switched traffic to the backup channel at 11:05, and success rates have returned to normal. Payments are currently processing normally while we investigate the root cause. The next update will be shared by 1 p.m.
notes: 时间范围、影响比例和地区构成完整事实。
continues to investigate 保留根因不确定性。

questions.title: A/B 测试结论
questions.prompt: 新收银台使支付转化率提升 0.7 个百分点，95% 置信区间为 +0.2 至 +1.2 个百分点，退款率暂无显著变化。
questions.task: 用英文汇报结果、统计不确定性和上线建议。
questions.hint: 区分 no significant change 与 proven no impact。

answer.sample: The new checkout increased conversion by 0.7 percentage points, with a 95% confidence interval of 0.2 to 1.2 points. We did not detect a significant change in refunds, but the test was not designed to rule out small effects. I recommend a phased rollout with continued monitoring of conversion, refunds and support contacts.
notes: 同时给点估计和区间。
did not detect 不等于证明完全无影响。

questions.title: 高管一页摘要
questions.prompt: 活跃商户增长 18%，交易额增长 24%，但投诉率从 0.6% 升至 0.9%，主要是结算延迟。
questions.task: 写一个不超过 100 词的英文 executive summary，包含成绩、风险和下一季度重点。
questions.hint: 回答 so what，而不是罗列所有指标。

answer.sample: Q2 delivered strong growth: active merchants rose 18% and payment volume increased 24% quarter over quarter. However, complaints increased from 0.6% to 0.9%, mainly due to settlement delays. Growth is healthy, but the settlement experience may limit retention. In Q3, we will prioritize reliability, reduce delayed payouts by 50%, and add proactive merchant notifications.
notes: 先承认增长，再说明体验风险。
下一季度重点包含量化目标。

levels.title: 会议与异议
levels.subtitle: 澄清、反对并推动会议形成决定
levels.objective: 能够在英语会议中确认理解、表达不同意见、处理异议并锁定下一步。
levels.chapter: 第四章 · 主持跨团队会议
levels.story: 项目进入争议密集期。你要在不破坏协作关系的前提下澄清问题、表达反对并锁定行动。

reward.title: 会议推进表达卡
reward.description: 遇到模糊需求、不同意见和资源冲突时可以直接调用。
items: Could we clarify which outcome matters most?
My concern is ...; I would recommend ...
Before we close, let me confirm the owner and deadline.

questions.title: 澄清模糊需求

activity.prompt: 对方只说“we need better performance”，最佳回应是什么？
choices: Sure, we will improve it as soon as possible.
Could we clarify the target metric, scope and decision deadline?
Why was the requirement not defined before the meeting?
activity.feedback: 先澄清指标、范围和决策时间，才能把抽象要求转成可执行问题。

questions.prompt: 对方说“we need better payment performance”，但没有说明指标、市场或时间范围。
questions.task: 用英文提出三项澄清问题，并复述你理解的决策目标。
questions.hint: 围绕 metric、scope 和 decision。

answer.sample: To make sure we solve the right problem, could we clarify three points? Which outcome matters most: authorization rate, conversion or speed? Are we focusing on a specific market or method? What decision do we need to make, and by when? My current understanding is that we need to identify the largest recoverable conversion gap for the Q3 roadmap.
notes: 提供具体选项比开放式追问更高效。
最后复述目标以检验双方是否一致。

questions.title: 礼貌表达反对
questions.prompt: 产品负责人建议一次性向所有商户上线新路由，你认为风险过高，建议先灰度。
questions.task: 用英文认可目标、陈述反对理由、给出替代方案，并邀请讨论。
questions.hint: 反对方案，不反对人。

answer.sample: I agree that we should capture the conversion benefit quickly. My concern is the operational risk because our pilot covered only two markets. I recommend starting with 10% of eligible traffic, reviewing success and error codes for 48 hours, and expanding if the guardrails hold. Would that phased approach meet the commercial timeline?
notes: 先确认共同目标，减少对立。
替代方案包含流量、观察期和放量条件。

questions.title: 回应“没有资源”
questions.prompt: 工程团队说本季度没有 bandwidth 支持对账优化，但该问题每周造成 40 小时人工处理。
questions.task: 用英文确认约束，量化价值，并提出最小范围或换优先级的选择。
questions.hint: 先寻找 smallest valuable scope。

answer.sample: I understand that the team is fully allocated. The current gap, however, requires about 40 hours of manual work each week. Could we estimate a smaller first step, such as automating the top two mismatch types? If that is not feasible, I would like to compare this item with the lowest-priority committed project so leadership can make an explicit trade-off.
notes: 先承认资源约束。
量化机会成本，并要求明确取舍。

questions.title: 锁定负责人和日期
questions.prompt: 会议讨论很多，但结束前没人明确谁负责定价分析，截止时间也含糊。
questions.task: 用英文总结决定，并确认 owner、deliverable 和 deadline。
questions.hint: 直接点名确认，但给对方纠正空间。

answer.sample: Before we close, let me confirm the next step. We agreed to compare the current pricing model with a volume-based option. Maya, my understanding is that you will own the analysis and share a one-page recommendation by next Thursday. Is that scope and timing workable for you? I will document the dependencies today.
notes: 用 before we close 自然切换到会议收口。
确认产出是一页建议，而不是模糊的 analysis。

questions.title: 处理区域市场异议
questions.prompt: 总部希望统一商户激励政策，拉美团队认为当地现金流周期不同，统一政策会降低参与率。
questions.task: 用英文回应区域团队：验证关切、追问证据，并提出可验证的折中方案。
questions.hint: 不要立即否定，也不要无条件接受。

answer.sample: That concern makes sense if merchants operate on a longer cash-conversion cycle. Could you share the data showing where the standard policy creates the largest gap? We could keep the global eligibility rules but test a different payout schedule for a defined segment. If participation improves without higher loss, we would have evidence for a regional adjustment.
notes: 先解释 why it makes sense。
折中方案保持全球规则，只测试本地敏感变量。

levels.title: 跨区域协作
levels.subtitle: 在本地差异与全球一致性之间做取舍
levels.objective: 能够讨论本地化、市场进入、时区协作和合规不确定性，并形成跨区域机制。
levels.chapter: 第五章 · 推动区域上线
levels.story: 总部规则遇到本地市场现实。你需要区分翻译与本地化，并在合规、速度和增长之间做取舍。

reward.title: 跨区域协作卡
reward.description: 把本地关切转化为可验证、可治理的区域方案。
items: Localization adapts the full experience, not only the language.
We have not yet confirmed whether ...
Use a defined segment and explicit decision rules.

questions.title: 本地化不只是翻译

activity.prompt: 哪一句最准确地区分 translation 和 localization？
choices: Localization adapts the full experience to local behavior and requirements.
Localization means translating every sentence into the local language.
Translation includes regulation, payment methods and support operations.
activity.feedback: 本地化覆盖行为、产品、监管和运营，翻译只是其中一个语言环节。

questions.prompt: 总部认为把英文收银台翻译成西班牙语就完成了墨西哥本地化，你需要说明还缺什么。
questions.task: 用英文解释 translation 与 localization 的差别，并给出至少三个需要验证的本地因素。
questions.hint: 考虑支付方式、信任、格式、监管和客服。

answer.sample: Translation changes the language, while localization adapts the full experience to local behavior and requirements. For Mexico, we should validate preferred payment methods, installment expectations, address formats, trust messages, regulatory disclosures and support flows. We also need to test with local users rather than assume a translated global design will convert equally well.
notes: 用 changes 与 adapts 形成清楚对比。
列举因素覆盖产品、监管和运营。

questions.title: 市场进入建议
questions.prompt: 市场 A 规模大但合规复杂，市场 B 规模较小但已有支付伙伴。团队要选择先进入哪个。
questions.task: 用英文写一段建议，交代评价标准、不确定性和分阶段决策。
questions.hint: 建议也可以是先购买信息。

answer.sample: I recommend prioritizing Market B for the first launch while completing a regulatory feasibility assessment for Market A. Market A has greater long-term potential, but licensing uncertainty could change both cost and timing. Market B offers a faster path to validated demand through an existing partner. We can revisit Market A once the compliance estimate reaches decision quality.
notes: 明确短期行动与长期机会不是互相排斥。
建议体现速度、规模与不确定性的权衡。

questions.title: 跨时区工作约定
questions.prompt: 上海、伦敦和圣保罗团队共同上线项目，会议经常落在某一团队深夜，异步信息也不完整。
questions.task: 用英文提出包含会议轮换、异步文档、响应时限和紧急升级的工作约定。
questions.hint: 机制需要公平且可执行。

answer.sample: I propose a rotating meeting schedule so the same region does not always carry the late-hour burden. Decision topics should be posted at least 24 hours before the meeting, and each region should respond within one business day. Decisions and owners will be recorded after the call. Launch-critical incidents will use the on-call channel and named regional contacts.
notes: rotating schedule 体现时区负担公平。
明确时间标准，并区分日常与紧急沟通。

questions.title: 表达合规不确定性
questions.prompt: 新市场的促销返现是否构成受监管资金活动尚无结论，业务团队仍要求给上线日期。
questions.task: 用英文说明已知、未知、决策门槛和当前可以并行推进的工作。
questions.hint: 不要在未知时承诺日期。

answer.sample: We have not yet confirmed whether the cashback flow falls within the local regulated-funds perimeter. Legal expects an external opinion by 15 September, and that conclusion is a launch dependency. Until then, we should not commit to a public launch date. We can still complete product design, vendor due diligence and alternative fund-flow models.
notes: has not yet confirmed 精确表达当前状态。
列出可并行工作，避免团队完全停滞。

questions.title: 总部与本地目标冲突
questions.prompt: 总部要求统一提高支付费率以改善利润，本地团队担心头部商户流失。双方用不同指标证明自己正确。
questions.task: 用英文重构争议，提出共同目标、分层分析和决策规则。
questions.hint: 把“谁对”改成“什么情境下采取什么动作”。

answer.sample: Both teams are trying to improve sustainable net revenue, but Global emphasizes margin while the local team emphasizes retention. I suggest segmenting merchants by profitability, price sensitivity and strategic value, then estimating net revenue under several scenarios. We can raise prices where expected gains exceed churn risk, while using approved, time-limited exceptions for sensitive high-value merchants.
notes: 先定义 sustainable net revenue 作为共同目标。
例外需要批准和到期日期。

levels.title: 英文面试
levels.subtitle: 把经历讲成可验证的业务能力
levels.objective: 能够用结构化英文完成自我介绍、项目案例、失败复盘和岗位动机表达。
levels.chapter: 最终章 · 赢得英文面试
levels.story: 项目成果成为你的面试证据。最后一章要把经历压缩成清楚、可信并能经得住追问的英文案例。

reward.title: 英文面试结构卡
reward.description: 从开场到追问，用结构代替临场背诵。

questions.title: 60 秒自我介绍

activity.prompt: 哪一种自我介绍开场最容易建立岗位相关性？
choices: I graduated several years ago and then worked at three companies.
Let me walk you through every position on my resume.
I am a strategy and operations professional focused on turning data into scalable improvements.
activity.feedback: 先给职业定位和价值，再用项目证据支撑，比逐年复述简历更有效。

questions.prompt: 你面试支付策略运营岗位，需要在一分钟内建立与岗位的相关性，不能逐年复述简历。
questions.task: 写一个 90 至 120 词的英文自我介绍，包含定位、两项证据和求职方向。
questions.hint: 使用 present → evidence → future。

answer.sample: I am a strategy and operations professional focused on turning customer and transaction data into scalable improvements. In my recent work, I used funnel analysis to identify high-impact experience gaps and led projects across product, data and frontline teams with clear owners and measurable outcomes. I am now looking to apply that combination of analytics and execution to payment growth and merchant operations, where reliability, economics and customer experience must be managed together.
notes: 开头先给职业定位，而非学校和年份。
结尾展示对支付工作的具体理解。

questions.title: STAR-L 项目案例
questions.prompt: 面试官问：Tell me about a project where you improved a payment or customer journey.
questions.task: 写一个可替换数字的英文 STAR-L 答案，突出个人判断、行动、结果和复盘。
questions.hint: Situation 与 Task 要短，把篇幅留给 Action、Result 和 Learning。

answer.sample: Situation: We saw a [X%] drop between checkout and successful payment. Task: I was responsible for finding the main recoverable gap within six weeks. Action: I rebuilt the funnel by market, method and response code, found a weak routing rule, and aligned Product, Risk and Engineering on a guarded pilot. Result: Success improved by [X] points and recovered [amount] in monthly volume. Learning: I now define decision and rollback thresholds before launch.
notes: 使用 I rebuilt、I aligned 明确个人贡献。
Learning 是可复用的方法，而不是泛泛感想。

questions.title: 失败经历
questions.prompt: 面试官问 Tell me about a failure. 不能把优点包装成缺点，也不能把责任推给协作方。
questions.task: 写一个英文失败案例：真实错误、影响、补救、机制变化和后续证据。
questions.hint: 重点是 ownership 和 changed behavior。

answer.sample: I once launched a policy after validating the average impact but not smaller regional segments. The overall metric improved, yet complaints rose sharply in one segment and we paused the rollout. I owned the gap, contacted affected customers and rebuilt the analysis. I then added segment guardrails and a pre-launch checklist. In the next two launches, all segment metrics stayed within the agreed thresholds.
notes: 明确错误是自己验证维度不足。
用后续项目证明行为真正改变。

questions.title: 为什么这个岗位
questions.prompt: 面试官问 Why are you interested in this role? 需要避免只说平台大、发展好或对支付感兴趣。
questions.task: 写一个三部分英文答案：工作内容匹配、已有证据、希望扩展的能力。
questions.hint: 把 JD 中的具体问题与自己的经历连起来。

answer.sample: This role combines three types of work I do well: diagnosing performance with data, designing an operating strategy, and coordinating delivery across product and commercial teams. I have used funnel and cohort analysis to prioritize customer problems and translated findings into owned action plans. The role would let me apply those strengths to payment reliability and merchant growth while deepening my knowledge of payment economics and international operations.
notes: 从实际工作内容切入，不用空泛公司赞美。
用过去证据支持 fit，再说明能力延伸。

questions.title: 五分钟项目陈述
questions.prompt: 终面要求用五分钟介绍一个代表项目，然后接受追问。你需要控制结构，并主动暴露关键取舍。
questions.task: 写出英文陈述提纲和结尾可向面试官提出的两个高质量问题。
questions.hint: 使用 problem → insight → decision → execution → impact → reflection。

answer.sample:
Opening: I will describe a project where we improved [journey] through data diagnosis and cross-functional delivery.
1. Business problem and customer impact.
2. Insight that changed our understanding.
3. Options and the trade-off I recommended.
4. Pilot, owners, risks and disagreement.
5. Quantified impact and limitations.
6. What I would repeat or change.

Questions:
- Which payment or merchant metric is hardest for this team to improve today?
- How are decisions divided between global product and local operations?
notes: 主动讲 options 和 limitations，展示判断质量。
反问聚焦真实难题和决策机制。
